candidates.why: Clean short-term debt line and excludes leases by label semantics.
Same concept as above, alternate label variant across periods.

candidates.row_label: Long Term Debt Maturing within 1 Year
candidates.why: Current portion of long-term debt; may be relevant when short-term debt is presented via maturities instead of a short-term debt total.

final_choice.row_label: Long Term Debt Maturing within 1 Year

variables.notes: R:nc. Excluded lease-labelled rows. Included short-term debt labels plus current maturities label because the company appears to present current financing debt differently across periods. Manual review is recommended to ensure no overlap between short-term debt and maturities in any specific year.

candidates.why: Best direct match to taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Likely current income tax liability label in some periods.
Tax-related but usually indirect tax rather than income taxes payable.

variables.notes: R:c. No shortlist candidate was provided; selected confident balance-sheet tax-liability labels exactly as written. Excluded VAT liability because it is indirect tax, not the preferred taxes-payable concept.

candidates.why: Best available reported PPE-type total/net tangible asset line on the balance sheet.
Would be ideal for gross PPE, but preview shows no values and may not be the active reported line.

candidates.row_label: Total Tangible Assets, Gross - Balancing Value
candidates.why: Balancing line, less preferable than a reported tangible assets line.

variables.notes: Chose a label outside the shortlist because it is the clean, populated balance-sheet PPE/tangible-assets total and is more reliable than the gross/balancing candidates shown as blank.
